articles.author: Gilberto Manzano
articles.title: Matching World Cup Teams With NFL Squads: Why England Is the Seahawks of Soccer - Sports Illustrated
articles.description: Soccer has taken over the United States this summer, inviting natural comparisons to America's version of football.
articles.content:
With the World Cup going on during the NFLs slow period, Ive watched plenty of soccer and even learned a few things. 
No, I still dont know what qualifies as an offsides in soccer, but Im pretty sur… [+9170 chars]
